name: community-hub
description: community-hub type/container manifest for the kanecta-api cutover (G5). Authored inputs — the seeder derives each type's sqlSchema via @kanecta/schema-compiler and creates the container hierarchy. Fields are camelCase; DB columns become snake_case automatically.

container.note: Domain container (authz cascades role grants down it — see community-hub-authz-mapping). Domain type items and instances nest under it via parentId.

functions.note: The computed-field backings are now authored as `query` items (see queries[]). The engine resolves each field's backedBy UUID to its query at runtime (buildComputedMap -> PgDataSource.runComputed). {{params.self}} binds to the row's item id, {{params.viewer}} to ctx.viewer.
functions.0c8a7b10-1111-4a00-8000-000000000201: ch-thread.hasUnread (perViewer) -> ch-thread-has-unread.query.json (joins obj_ch-thread <-> obj_ch-thread-read on viewer)
functions.0c8a7b10-1111-4a00-8000-000000000203: ch-message.replyCount (shared) -> ch-message-reply-count.query.json (count of non-deleted child ch-message items)

todo: Remaining domains (finances, events, notices, pages, suggestions, trust) — author their type files the same way.
Reactions: mutable current-state ch-reaction items (one per active (user,message,emoji)); reactions map via G2 aggregation.
Finalise UUIDs (currently deterministic placeholders) before seeding.
